name: PB-01 | Phishing Triage & Automated Containment
description: Production playbook. Ingests phishing alerts from Wazuh via webhook. Extracts artifacts, enriches via VirusTotal and AbuseIPDB, performs blast radius assessment, then routes to automated containment or analyst escalation based on threat score threshold.

trigger.description: Listens for JSON payloads pushed by Wazuh ossec.conf integration block on alert level >= 10 for group: phishing,pb01

nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.description: Entry point. Receives raw JSON payload from Wazuh. All downstream nodes reference this payload via $exec.

nodes.name: Artifact Extraction & Normalization
nodes.description: Extracts and normalizes key forensic primitives from the incoming webhook payload into discrete pipeline variables.

nodes.name: VirusTotal — File Hash Lookup
nodes.description: Submits the attachment SHA256 hash to VirusTotal. Returns malicious vendor count, threat category, and detection ratio.

nodes.name: AbuseIPDB — Source IP Reputation
nodes.description: Validates source IP against AbuseIPDB. Returns abuse confidence score, ISP, country code, and total reports.

nodes.name: Blast Radius Assessment
nodes.description: Queries AD/Azure AD to determine recipient's role, group membership, and privilege level. Flags VIPs, Domain Admins, and C-suite.

output_variables.is_vip: {{ $result.memberOf | contains('Domain Admins') or $result.memberOf | contains('Executive') or $result.memberOf | contains('C-Suite') }}

nodes.name: Composite Threat Score Calculation
nodes.description: Aggregates enrichment outputs into a composite threat score (0-100). Weights: VT detection ratio (50%), IP abuse score (30%), VIP target bonus (20%).

nodes.name: Threat Score Decision Gate
nodes.description: Routes to automated containment if composite_score >= threshold (default: 75). Routes to analyst escalation queue if below threshold.

nodes.name: M365 — Purge Mailbox
nodes.description: Calls Microsoft Graph API to purge the phishing email from ALL mailboxes matching the subject and sender combination. Hard delete — bypasses Deleted Items.

nodes.name: Block Sender IP & Domain
nodes.description: Pushes sender domain and source IP to firewall block list via REST API. Also adds domain to M365 tenant blocked sender list.

nodes.name: CrowdStrike EDR — Isolate Host (Conditional)
nodes.description: Checks EDR for process execution events matching the attachment hash on the recipient's endpoint. If execution confirmed, isolates host from network. Preserves forensic memory state.

nodes.name: TheHive — Create Enriched Case
nodes.description: Creates a structured incident case in TheHive. Populates with full artifact data, enrichment results, blast radius context, and composite score. Routes to Tier 1 analyst queue.

input.title: PB-01 | Phishing Alert — {{ $node_02_extract.email_subject }} | Score: {{ $node_06_score.composite_score }}
input.description:
## Phishing Alert — Automated Triage Output

**Alert ID:** {{ $exec.alert_id }}
**Timestamp:** {{ $exec.timestamp }}
**Composite Threat Score:** {{ $node_06_score.composite_score }} / 100

### Artifacts
| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Sender | {{ $exec.artifacts.sender }} |
| Source IP | {{ $exec.artifacts.source_ip }} |
| Recipient | {{ $exec.artifacts.recipient }} |
| Subject | {{ $exec.artifacts.subject }} |
| Attachment | {{ $exec.artifacts.attachment_name }} |
| SHA256 | {{ $exec.artifacts.attachment_sha256 }} |

### Enrichment Results
| Source | Finding |
|---|---|
| VirusTotal | {{ $node_03_vt_hash.vt_malicious_count }} / {{ $node_03_vt_hash.vt_total_engines }} engines | {{ $node_03_vt_hash.vt_threat_label }} |
| AbuseIPDB | Abuse score: {{ $node_04_abuseipdb.ip_abuse_score }} | Country: {{ $node_04_abuseipdb.ip_country }} | ISP: {{ $node_04_abuseipdb.ip_isp }} |
| Tor Exit Node | {{ $node_04_abuseipdb.ip_is_tor }} |

### Blast Radius
| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Recipient Name | {{ $node_05_blast_radius.user_display_name }} |
| Department | {{ $node_05_blast_radius.user_department }} |
| Job Title | {{ $node_05_blast_radius.user_job_title }} |
| VIP / Privileged | {{ $node_05_blast_radius.is_vip }} |

nodes.name: Slack — Analyst Notification
nodes.description: Sends a structured alert card to the SOC Slack channel with key triage data, threat score, and direct link to the TheHive case.

metrics.estimated_mttd_reduction: Real-time (< 3 seconds from alert fire to enrichment complete)
metrics.estimated_mttr_reduction: 94% for high-confidence threats via autonomous containment
